headline: ONEOK (OKE) Stock May Be Undervalued Following Raised 2026 Guidance
summary: ONEOK stock has more than doubled over the past five years, yet on the latest valuation checks it still screens as having pockets of value rather than looking fully priced. With the shares recently closing at US$89.92 and a mixed overall value score, the question for investors is whether the market is already baking in the benefits of ONEOK's expansion projects and volume growth. ONEOK has returned 122.3% over five years, which puts the current valuation debate front and center for long term...
